description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow set on a spacious, landscaped plot with a mix of open green lawns, trees, and shrubs. The building features a flat roof design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and contemporary architectural profile. The front includes a wide driveway leading to a covered entrance and garage area, while the rear showcases a large patio and a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by outdoor seating and garden elements. Windows are generously distributed, with a mix of large and small panes, providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The exterior is finished in light, neutral tones, complemented by paved walkways and minimalistic landscaping. The overall layout emphasizes open space, privacy, and a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive lawns, a driveway, a pool, and large windows, set in a landscaped urban plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and manicured lawn with a few palm trees.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the pool area, patio, and additional garden landscaping with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the bungalow, the pool, patio, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the driveway's curve, garage, and the transition between the front and rear garden spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and scattered smaller panes
